summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 fixes: (1) Role API query param, (2) Independent upload flow, (3) DB-driven status endpoint. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed (100%). All fixes verified working correctly.

backend: FIX 1: GET /api/role?jobRole=AI%20%26%20ML%20Engineer returns 200 with empty data
FIX 1: GET /api/role without jobRole param returns 422 (validation error)
FIX 1: Old path param style /api/role/Software%20Engineer returns 404
FIX 2: GET /api/status returns naukri_count, pipeline_count, registered_count
FIX 2: GET /api/summary returns role-wise funnel stats
FIX 3: GET /api/status returns all counts as integers
FIX 3: GET /api/status requires authentication (401 without auth)
Health check - returns healthy status v4.0
frontend: Login page loads with form elements
Dashboard shows DB Status section with live counts (Naukri: 10, Pipeline: 7, Registered: 7)
Dashboard shows Upload Naukri and Upload Pipeline buttons
Dashboard shows View Applicants Summary Statistics nav panel
Dashboard shows View Applicants nav panel
Navigation: Dashboard → Summary page via nav button
Summary page: Table shows 7 roles with correct totals (7, 6, 2, 5, 2, 3, 4)
Summary page: Back button navigates to /dashboard
Navigation: Dashboard → Roles page via nav button
Roles page: Shows grid of 7 clickable job role cards
Roles page: Click role card → navigates to /roles/:jobRole
FIX 1: Role drill-down uses query param API (axios.get with params: { jobRole })
Role drill-down: Shows role-specific table with correct data
Role drill-down: Back button navigates to /roles
Logout button works on dashboard - redirects to /login

seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: /app/test_data/naukri_test.csv (10 records), /app/test_data/pipeline_test.csv (7 records). Current DB state: Naukri: 10, Pipeline: 7, Registered: 7
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 fixes verified working: (1) /api/role now uses query param ?jobRole= instead of path param - returns 422 without param, 200 with param, 404 for old path style. (2) Independent upload flow works - each upload succeeds alone. (3) /api/status returns live DB counts (naukri_count, pipeline_count, registered_count). Frontend RoleDrillDown.js correctly uses axios.get with params: { jobRole } for query param API. Dashboard shows DB status section with live counts. Summary page shows 7 roles with totals (7, 6, 2, 5, 2, 3, 4). Roles page shows 7 clickable role cards.

fix_1_role_query_param.frontend: RoleDrillDown.js uses axios.get with params: { jobRole: decodedRole }

fix_2_independent_upload.description: Each upload works independently without requiring the other

fix_3_status_endpoint.frontend: Dashboard shows DB status section with live counts
